name: argos-desktop
description: Argos desktop shell with immutable local configuration history

scripts.check: node --check src/main.mjs && node --check src/inject-menu.mjs && node --check src/history-store.mjs && node --check src/validation.mjs && node --check src/diff.mjs && node --check src/injected/argos-audit.cjs && node --check src/injected/menu/manifest.mjs && node --check src/injected/menu/combo-chord-capture.js && node --check src/preload/argos-preload.cjs && node --check src/preload/history-preload.cjs && node --check src/history/history.js
